result.markdown: --- title: "[data.available_datasets()]{.doc-object-name .doc-function .doc-label .doc-label-function}" body-classes: doc-api-page page-navigation: false html-table-processing: none --- ::: {.doc-subject} Return the names of all bundled datasets. ::: ::: {.doc-usage-source} Usage [Source](https://github.com/rich-iannone/greenwood/blob/main/greenwood/data/__init__.py#L38-L55){target="_blank" rel="noopener"} ::: ::: {.doc-signature .doc-Kind.FUNCTION} ```python data.available_datasets() ``` ::: ## Returns {.doc-returns} ::: {.doc-definition-items} [list[str]]{.doc-parameter-annotation} : Sorted list of dataset names that can be passed to `load_dataset()`. ::: ## Examples {.doc-examples} ::: {#fa2bdb5d .cell execution_count=1} ``` {.python .cell-code} import greenwood as gw # List all bundled dataset names gw.available_datasets() ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=1} ``` ['colon', 'lung', 'mgus2', 'ovarian', 'pbc', 'veteran'] ``` ::: :::
